message:
feat(engine): add 91 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Second batch of enrichment tests:

- benchmark_coverage_saturation: 29 tests (board lifecycle, verdict
  classification, representativeness scoring, entry hash integrity)
- bifurcation_boundary_scanner: 14 tests (scanner construction,
  envelope boundary detection, observation recording, serde)
- bounded_feedback_controller: 16 tests (PI controller behavior,
  anti-windup clamping, disabled mode bypass, coordinator health)
- capability_pruned_dispatch: 13 tests (pruning policy hashing,
  dispatch routes, rejection variants, corpus execution)
- claim_atom_lattice: 19 tests (claim atoms, evidence morphisms,
  constraint lattice, entitlement evaluation, summary rendering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
